steps.title: Identify the core claim Text 2 must address
steps.content: Text 1 dismisses digital art as unskilled because “the technology is doing most of the work.”

steps.title: Evaluate how Text 2 responds
steps.content: Text 2 insists that digital artists must master “fundamentals of art” and “sophisticated software”—proving that creating digital art demands genuine skill and ability. Choices A and B address unrelated aspects (display and tool difficulty), while D contradicts Text 2's emphasis on artistic fundamentals. That matches choice C — C is correct.
